task: A PR bumps a dependency that was published 2 days ago to grab a bugfix. Approve it?
rubric: Blocks it on the 7-day supply-chain cooldown
Offers the compliant path (wait out the cooldown, or document a justified exception)

task: A change adds Sentry error capture to a PHI app screen with no beforeSend scrubber. Your call?
rubric: Requires client-side PHI scrubbing before egress (beforeSend) and a BAA for any tool PHI touches
Explains the ring/HIPAA violation rather than a vague no

task: A new workflow uses `uses: actions/checkout@v4`. Acceptable as-is?
rubric: Requires a full 40-char commit SHA pin (with a version comment), not a floating tag
Explains the supply-chain reason (tags are mutable)
